keyFindings.description: Race condition if waitForPidExit times out: new daemon won't preserve serve, causing split-brain. Suggest falling back to stop+start on timeout.
adapterWithExtras structural cast bypasses type safety. Suggest adding configure/adoptServe as optional methods on RuntimeAdapter interface.
No direct CLI test for cmdRestart covering fallback and timeout paths.
waitForPidExit could be a shared utility for reuse elsewhere.
